title: Financial Planning and Short-Term Finance: According to CAPM, if the market risk premium increases, the...
summary: Apply the Capital Asset Pricing Model to calculate expected returns or evaluate security pricing.
prompt: According to CAPM, if the market risk premium increases, the expected return on a stock will also increase.

options.text: CAPM establishes that the expected return on a stock is directly related to the

solution: CAPM establishes that the expected return on a stock is directly related to the market risk premium; thus, an increase in the risk premium raises the expected return on the stock.
